item.title: Grain Truck Tips Over on the Road
item.description: A grain truck that has tipped over requires careful recovery and cleanup on the roadway. How are large load rollovers handled safely?

media:content.media:title: Grain Truck Tips Over on the Road
media:content.media:description: A grain truck that has tipped over requires careful recovery and cleanup on the roadway. How are large load rollovers handled safely?

item.title: Box Truck Crash Leaves Vehicle Destroyed
item.description: A damaged box truck is recovered after a serious crash, highlighting cleanup and safety procedures. What steps follow a major incident like this?

media:content.media:title: Box Truck Crash Leaves Vehicle Destroyed
media:content.media:description: A damaged box truck is recovered after a serious crash, highlighting cleanup and safety procedures. What steps follow a major incident like this?

item.title: Finding the Best Way Out
item.description: A recovery situation focused on choosing the safest and most effective way to move a vehicle. What determines the best way out?

media:content.media:title: Finding the Best Way Out
media:content.media:description: A recovery situation focused on choosing the safest and most effective way to move a vehicle. What determines the best way out?

item.title: Giving Instructions as I Work
item.description: A real-time walkthrough of recovery work while instructions are given during the process. How does communication improve complex jobs?

media:content.media:title: Giving Instructions as I Work
media:content.media:description: A real-time walkthrough of recovery work while instructions are given during the process. How does communication improve complex jobs?

item.title: Let's Look and Not Take It for Granted
item.description: A reminder to stay aware and appreciate safe working conditions during demanding recovery operations. Why does attention to detail matter so much on the job?

media:content.media:title: Let's Look and Not Take It for Granted
media:content.media:description: A reminder to stay aware and appreciate safe working conditions during demanding recovery operations. Why does attention to detail matter so much on the job?

item.title: When You Gotta Go, You Gotta Go
item.description: An unexpected situation interrupts a recovery job, adding humor and realism to the day. How do crews handle surprises on the job?

media:content.media:title: When You Gotta Go, You Gotta Go
media:content.media:description: An unexpected situation interrupts a recovery job, adding humor and realism to the day. How do crews handle surprises on the job?

item.title: A Special Challenge
item.description: A unique recovery scenario tests skill, planning, and adaptability in the field. What makes this job different from the rest?

media:content.media:title: A Special Challenge
media:content.media:description: A unique recovery scenario tests skill, planning, and adaptability in the field. What makes this job different from the rest?

item.title: Container Recovery Assistance
item.description: A recovery job involving a container requires coordination, precision, and the right equipment to move heavy loads safely. How do crews handle unstable cargo like this?

media:content.media:title: Container Recovery Assistance
media:content.media:description: A recovery job involving a container requires coordination, precision, and the right equipment to move heavy loads safely. How do crews handle unstable cargo like this?

item.title: The Secret Is to Do It Slowly
item.description: Precision and patience prove essential in complex recovery work. Why does slowing things down often lead to better results?

media:content.media:title: The Secret Is to Do It Slowly
media:content.media:description: Precision and patience prove essential in complex recovery work. Why does slowing things down often lead to better results?

item.title: Big Truck Stuck in the Mud
item.description: A heavy truck becomes stuck in deep mud, requiring traction, power, and strategy to recover. What makes muddy recoveries so difficult?

media:content.media:title: Big Truck Stuck in the Mud
media:content.media:description: A heavy truck becomes stuck in deep mud, requiring traction, power, and strategy to recover. What makes muddy recoveries so difficult?

item.title: He Hit the Bridge
item.description: A recovery situation involving a truck that made contact with a bridge, requiring careful assessment and planning. What went wrong and how is it fixed?

media:content.media:title: He Hit the Bridge
media:content.media:description: A recovery situation involving a truck that made contact with a bridge, requiring careful assessment and planning. What went wrong and how is it fixed?

item.title: Rotator Handles a 184,000-Lb Recovery
item.description: A massive recovery operation showcases the strength and capability of a heavy-duty rotator. What does it take to move loads this size?

media:content.media:title: Rotator Handles a 184,000-Lb Recovery
media:content.media:description: A massive recovery operation showcases the strength and capability of a heavy-duty rotator. What does it take to move loads this size?

item.title: Securing a Rolls-Royce
item.description: A classic Rolls-Royce is stabilized and recovered with precision and care. What steps protect high-value vehicles during recovery?

media:content.media:title: Securing a Rolls-Royce
media:content.media:description: A classic Rolls-Royce is stabilized and recovered with precision and care. What steps protect high-value vehicles during recovery?

item.title: A Very Old Rolls Royce
item.description: Careful handling is required to recover a vintage Rolls-Royce and protect its condition. Why does age make recovery more delicate?

media:content.media:title: A Very Old Rolls Royce
media:content.media:description: Careful handling is required to recover a vintage Rolls-Royce and protect its condition. Why does age make recovery more delicate?
